title: start
body:
Thought: Ugh...;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_側坐看內)>>;//主角出廁所頭痛
Frances Cheng: Hey, you're already dressed?;<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服1_正站頭痛返回)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服1_正站右看)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yeah.
    //
->Right. You ready?
    Frances Cheng: I'm ready.
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: ...

<<#Simple(6)>>
->What are you watching?
    Frances Cheng: The neighbor's cat.;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_側坐看內返回)>>
    Frances Cheng: It's trying to catch a bird outside the window.
    <<#Simple(10)>>
    ->Any success?
        Frances Cheng: ...
        Frances Cheng: Of course not.
        Frances Cheng: Or else I won't have anything to watch.
    ->Do you want it to catch the bird?
        Frances Cheng: ...
        Frances Cheng: ...I don't know.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    <<PlayUntil(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_側坐看內)>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
//門鈴
Frances Cheng: Hmm? Someone's at the door.
<<#End>>

title: 跟隆生分別去公司
body:
//張隆生往右走，撥一個跳下高台的動畫往右走

Lawrence Chang: Hey, are you taking the subway to work, Jason?
Lawrence Chang: I'll ride my chopper. See you at the farm.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->OK.
    //
->Can't you give me a ride?
    Lawrence Chang: No can do, haha!
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang: I guess I will beat you to the farm...
Lawrence Chang: Come find me at my desk when you arrive.
Lawrence Chang: See you!
<<#End>>

title: 幫隆生開門
body:
//開門以吼
Lawrence Chang: Evening, Jason!
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Evening.
    //
->I thought you and Situ have the key to my place?
    Lawrence Chang: Knock first when somebody is home. Manners matter.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang: Nin's calling you over. Today's briefing session is about to start.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Coming right away.
    //
->How's it going?
    Lawrence Chang: How's what going?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Data from the Flop Core. All done?
    ->The data we brought back.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Lawrence Chang: Ah, um...
    Lawrence Chang: The analyzation is done, although they haven't told me anything about the result yet.
    Lawrence Chang: We will know soon.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang: Come over and find out.
<<#End>>
//龍聲走進臥室，程芳已經坐在椅子上或是床邊，隆生直接蹲下檢查這裡所主角跑步？

title: 跟程芳說是隆生
body: Frances Cheng: Who was that? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Lawrence. Frances Cheng: Calling us to the briefing? ->We should go. Situ is waiting. Frances Cheng: Yeah. <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: ... <<#Simple(6)>> ->Fran? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: Before anything, hear this, J. Frances Cheng: I've been thinking about it the whole night. Frances Cheng: Please... Frances Cheng: Please promise me, that today will be your last day at Silencio. Thought: Huh? Why...? Frances Cheng: Actually, I had a talk with Ms. Situ yesterday. Frances Cheng: Silencio is no longer safe for you. Frances Cheng: You got out yesterday, but barely. Worse still, they saw your face. Frances Cheng: Ms. Situ agreed with me, that if she's to make the decision... Frances Cheng: Her first priority would be to evacuate you before things get any worse. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Why didn't she do that? Frances Cheng: Because she believes the decision is up to us. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: Jason. Frances Cheng: Right now you're still safe, relatively. Vision won't openly send mercenaries into the farm during work hours. Frances Cheng: But over time, they probably will. Frances Cheng: Yesterday I did say I won't stop you from getting involved. Frances Cheng: This, though, is too risky. You're essentially giving yourself away. Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: Promise me, J, don't ever go to the farm after today. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I promise. Frances Cheng: Thank you, Jason. ->Well, I don't have any other choice. Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: Do you mean you want to stay? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah. ->Not exactly. <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: Sorry, J, I'm one hundred percent adamant about this. Frances Cheng: Thank you, for not insisting. <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: Let's go. Frances Cheng: Time to meet with Ms. Situ. <<#End>> //乘方輪椅滑到司徒寧家

title: 沒去麵店捷運陳木海
body: //沒去麵店陳木海對談+沒有告訴陳木海自己的經歷 Thought: ... Thought: Woody Chen... Woody Chen: Hello, my kin. <> Thought: ...Is it just me? Thought: Or is he kinda depressed? <<#Simple(6)>> ->The meeting with Ivan Zhang, it didn't go well? Woody Chen: ... Woody Chen: It went smoothly. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen: I exchanged some intel with him. Woody Chen: The only thing I can tell you, though, is... Woody Chen: We do not know if the Source is gone for good. Our "freedom" at the moment could be temporary. Woody Chen: We may be recalled or recycled sometime in the future. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Meaning? Woody Chen: We will very likely part with these possessed bodies. Woody Chen: As to what happens next, your guess is as good as mine. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen: I have done my part. Woody Chen: We will not meet again. <<#Simple(3)>> ->Wait. Woody Chen: ...What? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Why won't we meet again? Woody Chen: I have chosen to put everything behind. Woody Chen: Before being recalled or recycled, I will take my time to enjoy this life. Woody Chen: You should do the same. ->What exactly did Zhang say? Woody Chen: Don't ask. Woody Chen: I said I will decide what to tell you. Woody Chen: You have heard it all. <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen: This conversation stops here. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen: Take care, my kin. <<#End>>

title: 23問主角有沒有猜到誰是內鬼
body: 23(c): Hey, Jason! <<#Simple(8)>> ->23 ->Aren't you on a mission? 23(c): I am. It's just that... ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): Something's been bugging me. 23(c): Yesterday after we went through the entire data trove, I did some search with the codename "Sleepy God". 23(c): There was barely any result. 23(c): That was not surprising, considering it's a Red Room project. 23(c): All communications about it are encrypted end-to-end. 23(c): There is no such thing as a perfect secret, though. 23(c): I caught a few messages carrying the name, from the Red Room staff to the Silencio staff. 23(c): The messages themselves didn't have anything of value to offer, but now we know someone at Silencio is aware of the project. 23(c): That gave me an idea. 23(c): I can't hack into the Red Room database, not without being caught. 23(c): Although hacking into Silencio's database is a piece of cake. 23(c): We just need to identify this person, then follow the lead. 23(c): The issue right now is that I can't pinpoint who this person is. 23(c): I can't comb through every single message sent by every staff member. Don't have that kind of time. 23(c): This might be a stretch, but do you happen to know who it could be? <> <<@猜是誰答案是葉慈恩時間>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I might do. 23(c): Oh? 23(c): Which division? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Screening. 23(c): And the name? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->George Liao. // ->Edith Yeh. <> ->Wayne Zheng. ->Jeff Wu. <<#EndSimple>> ->Ops. 23(c): And the name? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Jesse Lai. ->Justin Wu. ->Kaylee Chen. ->Paxton Luo. <<#EndSimple>> ->Logistics. 23(c): And the name? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Rose Sun. ->Cynthia Ho. // ->Soma Wan. ->Nobo Dee. 23(c): Seriously? People actually name their children that?? <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): OK, I'll have a look. 23(c): Will keep you posted. 23(c): Thank you, Jason. ->No idea at all. 23(c): Figured. 23(c): Never mind. That's all I need to know. ->I thought this were against your values? ($DLStateFloat) <> 23(c): ... 23(c): It is against my values. 23(c): Desperate time calls for desperate measures. 23(c): ... 23(c): Just because I'm doing it doesn't mean I agree with it. 23(c): ...So? Any lead? <<#GoTo(@猜是誰答案是葉慈恩時間)>> <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): Talk to you later. <<#End>>

title: 說明第四日計畫2_2
body:
Yaron Kun: You folks got it, too?;<<PlayUntil(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_正站靠牆左看)>>;//幫手看相司徒跟23
23: Evacuation zones again...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看轉左)>>;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_正坐左看)>>
23: What do we do, Nin?;<<Play(23,MBU_二十三_基地側坐低頭返回)>>;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐右看轉左)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Emergency call from OWL?
    23: Yep.
->What's up?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
23: OWL is mobilizing all idle agents currently in west Wanpei.
Frances Cheng: May I know what's going on?;<<Play(23,MBU_二十三_基地側坐看內)>>
Nin Situ: ...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐左看返回)>>;<<PlayUntil(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_特務_靠桌螢幕返回)>>
Nin Situ: Trashmen down.;<<PlayUntil(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_特務_靠桌看內)>>;<<Play(23,MBU_二十三_基地側坐看內返回)>>;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_正坐左看返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->You're leaving now?
    Nin Situ: Yes.
->Trashmen? What's that?
    Nin Situ: OWL's sister unit. Just as secret.
    Nin Situ: They clean up after us.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Yaron Kun: This is bad. Targeting the Trashmen is effectively declaring war on OWL.;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右看)>>;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_正站靠牆左看抬頭)>>
Yaron Kun: Who's doing this? Wanna bet? Has to be a gang or something. My money is on Lions League.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看)>>;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看轉右)>>;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_特務_靠桌看內返回)>>
Lawrence Chang: No! Lions will never—
Yaron Kun: Defending them, eh? Are you their friends or what?;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐右看低頭)>>;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_正站靠牆左看抬頭返回)>>
Nin Situ: Stop, Lawrence.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看返回)>>;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_特務_靠桌看內)>>
Yaron Kun: Ha! I see. Well played, Situ.;<<Play(23,MBU_二十三_基地側坐低頭)>>
Yaron Kun: You've taken a Lion cub under your wing?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看)>>;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐右看低頭返回)>>;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_特務_靠桌看內返回)>>
Nin Situ: Shut up.;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右看返回)>>
Nin Situ: We must go now. Put this operation on pause before we come back.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看返回)>>;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐右看返回)>>;<<Set($DLState,阿寧靠桌轉側站)>>
Nin Situ: Jason, Lawrence. Go to the farm now and wait for further instructions.;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_正站靠牆左看返回)>>;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_特務_側站看內)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->How long will it take?
    Nin Situ: I don't know yet.
    23: This will take a while.
->Roger.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: What if you can't make it back in time?;<<Play(23,MBU_二十三_基地側坐低頭返回)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐左看)>>;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看)>>
Nin Situ: ...;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_正站靠牆左看)>>
23: Nin...?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐左看返回)>>
Nin Situ: I'm working on a Plan B. Meanwhile, just go to the farm and wait for instructions.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看返回)>>
Nin Situ: Where is it, 23?;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_正站靠牆左看返回)>>
23: Inside. Don't have much left, though.;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_正坐左看)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐左看)>>
Nin Situ: That will be enough. You and Helper get moving now. I will catch up soon enough.
23: No.;<<Play(23,MBU_二十三_基地側坐低頭)>>
Nin Situ: ...;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_正坐左看返回)>>
Nin Situ: OK. Helper, get moving. 23 will stay here with me for a bit.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐左看轉右)>>;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_特務_側站看內返回)>>
Yaron Kun: Nooooo!;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右看)>>;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐右看)>>;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_正站靠牆左看)>>
Nin Situ: ...
Nin Situ: Lawrence, Jason, to the farm. Remember, don't let them see you together.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看返回)>>;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐右看返回)>>;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_特務_側站看內)>>
<<Set($DLState,司徒走進臥室)>>
Lawrence Chang: You take the subway, Jason. Let's meet at the Screening office.;<<PlayUntil(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看)>>
<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Sure.
    //
->Can you give me a ride?
    Lawrence Chang: Nin said we can't be seen together!
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Ah, right. Sorry.
    ->Okay.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang: I'm rolling out.
Frances Cheng: Take care, J.;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右看掰掰)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看轉左)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->I will.
->Rest assured.
    Frances Cheng: Good.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Yaron Kun: Good luck, you guys!;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右看掰掰返回)>>;<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐左看轉右)>>;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_正站靠牆左看返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 說明第四日計畫_2
body: Nin Situ: 23;<>;<> 23: According to the data retrieved by Lawrence and Jason...;<>;<>;<> 23: Silencio is indeed churning out flops far beyond a reasonable level. 23: Weirder still, the farm is still providing just about as many flops even when the Cellar is in shutdown mode. Frances Cheng: We have the truth?;<> 23: Part of it.;<> 23: All these flops are generated somewhere else, channeled through Silencio.;<> 23: In other words, Silencio serves as a relay station. 23: The purpose must be to mask the true origin of these flops. //IF昨天車上討論有提到可能是隱藏來源 <<#If($GuessIsNewSource=0)>> 23: You were probably onto something, Jason.;<> 23: You suggested yesterday that Vision could be trying to hide the source of these additional flops. No we have no doubt. Thought: Hey, didn't you or Situ say that was way too much trouble for it's worth?;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->But you said Vision didn't need to go out of their way to do just that? Nin Situ: Correct. Nin Situ: We're now as confused as the next guy why Vision is doing it at all. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Frances Cheng: At least we are certain that Vision's mysterious flops come from elsewhere!;<>;<> Frances Cheng: That is fantastic news.;<> Lawrence Chang: Eh... How could that be fantastic? All I see is bad news.;<>;<>;<> Yaron Kun: She means your stupid ass theory is now busted. Vision is not fucking with juicer brains. They're not that stupid.;<> Yaron Kun: They generated these flops somewhere, only using Silencio to launder them. Nin Situ: We can rule out the worst case scenario now. All those people in the Cellar are safe.;<>;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: Ah, I see! Fantastic indeed! Yaron Kun: Really, I'm surprised that you folks believed in that bullshit theory even for a second.;<>;<> Yaron Kun: Vision doing what? Frying hundreds of thousands of brains for dinner? Come on!;<>;<> Nin Situ: We couldn't rule out that possibility. Yaron Kun: Ha! You should have your own brains checked up. All that hate for the government and big corps is making you batshit crazy.;<>;<> Yaron Kun: Think! They want sustainable profit, not shooting themselves in the foot! Thought: Yuna Hsu said something like that, too... Yaron Kun: What do you think these corporations are? Comic book villains? Lawrence Chang: That's what they are.;<> Yaron Kun: Ha! You're funny. I like you.;<>;<>;<> Yaron Kun: Say, where did you find this clown, Situ?;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: Shut the hell—;<> Nin Situ: Enough, Helper.;<> Nin Situ: Lawrence, don't let him get on your nerves.;<> Lawrence Chang: ...;<>;<>;<> Yaron Kun: Heh heh.;<> <>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->We're back to the drawing board? Vision is clean? Nin Situ: They certainly didn't do what we suspected. 23: But I'm sure they must have done something even worse. ->Why did they want to kill Fran, then? Nin Situ: That is our next breakthrough point. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: Next, we must find out where exactly did Vision get all these flops from.;<>;<> Nin Situ: And more importantly, why are they trying so hard to hide them. <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Any idea for a start? 23: Yes. ->I don't get it. What does that have to do with Fran? 23: It has a lot to do. Nin Situ: Whatever they're hiding, for whatever reason, silencing Frances is obviously part of their plan. Nin Situ: If we don't solve this mystery, they will keep coming. ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23: I did find a bit of clues in the Flop Core data trove.;<>;<>;<>;<> 23: One word keeps coming up in messages sent to and from the Red Room lab. 23: "Sleeping God".;<>;//投影出一對文字對話 Frances Cheng: Sleeping God...? 23: Judging by the context, it should be a codename, some kind of top secret research project. 23: We believe it's closely related to those unexplained flops.;<> 23: It could very well be the holy grail we're after. Nin Situ: However.;<>;<>;<>;<> Nin Situ: While mining the data, we found something of even more urgency.;//換畫面 Nin Situ: In their correspondence, they mentioned that Vision has recently purchased some children from Taihe District, as part of this Project Sleeping God. Frances Cheng: Children...!? <<#Simple(8)>> ->What do they need children for? Nin Situ: That is to be found out. ->There are children for sale? Nin Situ: There are, but fortunately, not many. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Excuse me...?;<> Nin Situ: Speak up.;<> Lawrence Chang: The way you talk about it, as if we will be looking for these sold children next?;<>;<> Nin Situ: ...Correct.;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: But they're already sold! Nin Situ: Yes, and there could be more, before we found this out.;<> Nin Situ: Our intel suggests there is another batch of children being detained at a facility, waiting for Vision to pick up. Nin Situ: We must save them before it's too late. Lawrence Chang: Hold on a second. This ain't right!;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: We now have a ton of evidence. Ms. Cheng's recording, the Flop Core data, plus what Helper brought...;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: We have more than enough to build a case against Vision for attempted murder and human trafficking. Lawrence Chang: I thought we were going to arrest Shane Yan and his gang first, then...;<>;<> Nin Situ: One thing at a time.;<> Lawrence Chang: Exactly. Sending them to the police should be the first thing! Nin Situ: Listen to yourself, Lawrence.;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: ...;<> Nin Situ: What happened to you could happen to these children, and you— Lawrence Chang: I'm avenging them by taking down the mastermind behind it all— Nin Situ: Avenge? Lawrence Chang: ...;<> Nin Situ: You're talking about avenging them, while they can still be saved?;<>;<> Nin Situ: Who is it that you truly want to avenge? The children, or yourself? Lawrence Chang: I—;<>;<>;<> Nin Situ: Listen up, Lawrence Chang. I've been repeating this ever since your first mission.;<> Nin Situ: What you do can't be the right thing when you're driven by hate alone. <> Lawrence Chang: I'M NOT!;<> Yaron Kun: Shall I excuse myself? I see some minion disciplining is due.;<>;<> Nin Situ: He's not a minion.;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: Huh! Aren't you always seeing me as a minion?;<> Nin Situ: Lawrence...;<>;<> <<@隆生吵架環節結束了喔>> Yaron Kun: Give it a break, folks. I don't get it why you keep making things complicated.;<>;<>;<> Yaron Kun: All this talk about the right thing, the wrong thing, as if it's a damn actual thing.;<> Yaron Kun: Follow your HEART, for fuck's sake! Do whatever it tells ya!;<> 23: My heart tells me not to listen to you.;<>;<>;<> Yaron Kun: ... Yaron Kun: On your girlfriend's side, eh? She's a true piece of work.;<>;<> 23: You are a true piece of work. 23: Stealing intel from OWL for your boss. I call that suicidal.;<>;<> Yaron Kun: How did you— 23: What will Grandma say if she finds out? Yaron Kun: Is that supposed to be a threat?;<> Yaron Kun: Oi, Situ! Tell your woman to watch her mouth. Nin Situ: She's her own woman.;<>;<> Nin Situ: She does whatever she wants, and takes consequences.;<>;<> Yaron Kun: You—;<> 23: What about you, eh? Ready to take your consequences?;<> Yaron Kun: ...;<>;<> Yaron Kun: ...;<> Yaron Kun: OK, you win.;<> Yaron Kun: I was a dick, and for that I apologize.;<> Yaron Kun: I'm sorry, okay?;<>;<> 23: ... Nin Situ: Let me remind you...;<>;<> Nin Situ: You need us as much as we need you. Think before you speak. Yaron Kun: ...;<>;<> Yaron Kun: I see.;<> Nin Situ: And you, Lawrence.;<>;<> Nin Situ: Get a grip. See the situation as it is and rearrange your priorities.;<>;<> Nin Situ: Don't make me kick you out of this operation. Understand? Lawrence Chang: ...;<>;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: Yes, ma'am.;<> Nin Situ: ... Nin Situ: Now, today's action plan.;<>;<> Nin Situ: First and foremost, Vision has purchased a batch of children from the Shithole. Nin Situ: To avoid attention, they're using proxies. In this case, hired gangs. Nin Situ: The issue is, we don't know how many children they have, and which gangs are doing their job. Nin Situ: This is where Helper came in. Nin Situ: ... Yaron Kun: Oh? Yaron Kun: May I speak now, milady? Nin Situ: Go on. Yaron Kun: Ahem! Yaron Kun: A couple of weeks ago, I was sent on a recon mission in the Shithole. Yaron Kun: All was smooth and well, until I picked up rumors about children for sale. Yaron Kun: Even in the Shithole, the selling and buying of children is considered a crime. Yaron Kun: Normally, this deserves a case of its own. Yaron Kun: When I reported the lead, though, they called me back. Told me to put everything on hold. Yaron Kun: Every agent of OWL has seen situations like this before... Yaron Kun: Corporations pulling strings. In this case, it has to be Vision. Yaron Kun: Anyway. Yaron Kun: Before following orders like a good boy, I got two things done. Yaron Kun: One, find out the list of these sold children. Yaron Kun: Two, verify that the deal is not done yet. They are being held by a gang, pending Vision's pickup. Yaron Kun: What I did not have time to do was to pinpoint the gang doing Vision's dirty work. <>;<> Nin Situ: To save these children... Nin Situ: We must get in touch with those who sold them, and find out which gang were they dealing with.;<> Nin Situ: Next step, locate the whereabouts of the children. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Sounds like I don't have a role in it? ->You're going to the Shithole? Nin Situ: No. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: I need you and Lawrence to meet some of these parents at Silencio.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Hold on. Parents? What are they doing at Silencio? Yaron Kun: The reason why they sold their own children is— Money, of course!;<>;<>;<> Yaron Kun: Most of them are dopeheads. They have a constant need for money. Yaron Kun: After selling your child, the next item down the list is yourself. They pretty much all end up in flop farms.;<> <>;<> ->Is it safe for me to return to Silencio? 23: Yes. Your good friend here managed to keep yesterday's mess down, for now.;<>;<> 23: You're not on Vision's radar yet. Relax and chill. <>;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: We will insert the parents of some sold children into today's consultation line. Nin Situ: Each of you pick one, and show up as their consultants.;<> Nin Situ: Let's get some intel out of them during the session. <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why don't we round them all up for one consultation marathon? 23: I can't just rewrite the whole list. The Screening staff will know.;<> <> ->How am I supposed to do that? 23: Probe them during the consultation session.;<>;<>;<> 23: I will be on the comms playing support. No worries. <>;<>;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23: One more thing. 23: Lawrence is expected to have a session today. No problem about that. //IF篩選組 <<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>> <> <> 23: You, though, Jason, will need an excuse. You haven't formally started the job yet. Find someone and offer to cover for them. 23: Can you do that? <<@篩選路線問換班失敗欸安捏>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->What if nobody needs covering? ($DLStateFloat) <> 23: No can do, then. We will have to lose one shot. 23: In that case, everything depends on Lawrence alone. 23: Any other questions? <<#GoTo(@篩選路線問換班失敗欸安捏)>> ->Can't you just change the shift schedule by hacking it? ($DLStateFloat2) <> 23: No. 23: It takes only a second to do, but will create a whole lot of questions. 23: Any other questions? <<#GoTo(@篩選路線問換班失敗欸安捏)>> ->Nope. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //IF操作組 <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>> 23: Since you're part of the Ops staff, Jason, you don't have a legit reason to appear in consultation sessions. 23: To secure maximum chance, you will cover Lawrence's shift, going through consultation and signing in his name. Lawrence Chang: ...Then I'll be out of the picture. We still have only one shot. 23: Correct. That's why I need you to find someone and offer to cover for them. Lawrence Chang: Why not Jason... Lawrence Chang: Aha! He's with Ops. Offering to cover consultation sessions would be weird. 23: Uh-huh. <<#EndIf>> Nin Situ: Consultation is the first step. Nin Situ: Get them into the contract room. I will take over from there. Thought: 23 is genuinely surprised...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You're infiltrating Silencio? Into the contract rooms? Nin Situ: Yes. ->Um, I'll let 23 do the talk. ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23: Don't tell me you're infiltrating Silencio again??;<>;<>;<>;<> 23: I thought we were clear on that. What if OWL finds—;<> Nin Situ: There are children at stake. We can't afford to screw this up.;<> 23: You—;<> Lawrence Chang: Are you saying Jason and I will screw this up?;<> Nin Situ: That is highly likely.;<>;<> Yaron Kun: Ouch! That hurts.;<> Lawrence Chang: ...You really don't trust us.;<>;<> Nin Situ: I don't mean that. 23: I will guide them over the comms, Nin. That should be enough.;<>;<> Nin Situ: ...;<> //司徒寧低頭沉思 Nin Situ: ...;<>;<> Nin Situ: Let's follow your plan, then.;<> Yaron Kun: Phew! We're finally done talking!;<> Nin Situ: Does anyone have any question about today's action plan? Frances Cheng: I have a question.;<>;<>;<>;//程芳舉手 Nin Situ: What is it?;<> Frances Cheng: Why don't we meet these parents at their homes?;<> Nin Situ: Because Helper says no.;<>;<> Yaron Kun: Oi, don't make me sound like a douchebag.;<>;<> Yaron Kun: There's a good reason for that.;<>;<> Yaron Kun: Vision has eyes all over the Shithole, keeping watch on these parents. They suspect someone is probing. Yaron Kun: Approaching them in the Shithole would be like diving right into a booby trap.;<> Frances Cheng: ...;<> 23: We must circumvent Vision's surveillance network.;<>;<>;<> 23: Not only for our immediate safety.;<>;<> 23: If they see us and tell OWL about it, that would be a real disaster.;<> Nin Situ: Conclusion, Silencio is the only dead zone.;<>;<>;<> Nin Situ: Consultation and signing are strictly one-on-one. Vision won't know what we're doing. Yaron Kun: Come on, enough chit chat. Yaron Kun: Time for some action? //三人通訊裝置發出逼逼生，他們都看向通訊器 <>;<>;<>;<>;<>;<>;<> <<#End>> //對話結束，停頓一段時間

title: 進到司徒基地_2
body: //多了一哥幫手特務 Yaron Kun: Hey there.;<>;<> Nin Situ: Evening. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Evening. // ->This is? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yaron Kun: Hello! Nin Situ: Allow me to introduce. This is— Yaron Kun: Call me Helper. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Helper, like, with capitalized H? ->Is that a codename or what? Nin Situ: Yes. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yaron Kun: Pardon the secrecy. Not very inclined to use my real name. I'm not...;<> Yaron Kun: ...Not as suicidal as they are. <> Nin Situ: Helper is an OWL agent. I called him in for support.;<>;<> Nin Situ: The case we're working on has something to do with one of his cases. Lawrence Chang: Aren't we supposed to keep this operation secret from OWL? Nin Situ: Yes, and that has not changed. Lawrence Chang: How would you explain... Yaron Kun: I'm here on behalf of my boss, not OWL. He wants to see Vision royally fucked. Yaron Kun: There, we have aligned interests! Let's get this little renegade operation of yours going! Nin Situ: I will explain how Helper works later. Yaron Kun: Oi, you're saying it as if I'm a toaster oven. 23: Hey, F! How's your foot?;<>;<> Frances Cheng: Much better! Thanks.;<> 23: Woo-hoo! Great!;<> 23: If you're still hurting, just let me know. Got painkillers at the ready. Frances Cheng: Will do. Thank you. Yaron Kun: Ahem!;<>;<> Yaron Kun: Shall we start, everyone?;<>;<> Nin Situ: Sure.;<>;<> Nin Situ: Have a seat, Jason.;<> <<#End>>

title: [以下這段文本改過動畫需要重新調整]
